creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It still doesn't builds with this patch: sip/qt/qimage.sip:535: error: 
'ANY' was not declared in this scope. Full build log here: 
http://people.freebsd.org/~rm/py27-qt-3.18.2_3%2c2.log . And would you 
please merge the patches with existing patches yourself next time? 
Thanks
